---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for civic intelligence or road safety analytics
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What civic or road-safety problem does this address? Who benefits (municipality, traffic dept, citizens)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. Include UI/UX notes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Privacy & safety impact

- [ ] Does not add facial recognition
- [ ] Does not add automatic fines/challans
- [ ] Keeps human review in the loop
- [ ] Uses civic-intelligence language (not surveillance framing)

Explain any privacy implications:

## MVP scope

- [ ] Fits Phase 1 (demo/mock)
- [ ] Requires Phase 2+ (real AI / DB / RTSP) — specify phase from [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md)

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references welcome. No real CCTV footage.
